# Hooks and Permissions

## Purpose

Use hooks as harness constraints, not committee governance.

## Useful hooks

```text
before_launch_packet_export
after_campaign_folder_created
before_budget_change
after_results_import
before_memory_update
```

## Checks

```text
required fields
budget caps
UTM completeness
measurement event present
learning memo present
claim links present
```

## Permission stance

Allow the agent to research, write, edit, and simulate freely.

Require explicit execution path for:

```text
spend changes
platform launch
public publication
customer-contacting automations
```

This is not to slow the agent. It is to keep the harness economically sane.
